## createAdminHydrator() function

Create repeat-safe hydration state scoped to one Alpine instance.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createAdminHydrator(alpine: Pick<AlpineLike, 'destroyTree' | 'initTree'>): AdminHydrator;
```

## Exceptions

`TypeError` when Alpine has no `initTree` method or hydration receives anything other than a real DOM Element.
